title: Request Construction, Method Semantics, Safety, and Idempotency · Go Client Systems · Go Semantics Case: Write Method Contracts
summary: A deployment controller creates and cancels rollout jobs, where duplicate writes could launch the same change twice. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go write method contracts increment in a Go 1.26 net/http method-aware request builder. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE from resource, replacement, partial-change, and repeat behavior. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Use GET and HEAD with conditional, range, cache, and body expectations that preserve their defined semantics. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
